---
title: "Talks & media"
---

## Talks

<!-- Add invited talks / conference presentations here, e.g.:
::: {.lead-block}
**Talk title.** Event / venue, location. Month Year.
:::
-->

::: {.lead-block}
*Add your invited talks and conference presentations here.*
:::

## Media

::: {.lead-block}
**Super Brain** (最强大脑) — UK representative and international finalist, Seasons 11
(2024) and 12 (2025). A Chinese televised contest of "mental athletics".
:::

::: {.lead-block}
**University Challenge** (BBC) — contestant, 2023.
:::
